summary: Incrementally raise test coverage: scan the codebase, write missing tests for the next uncovered module, validate, and track progress in memory.

name: Codebase Bug Hunt
summary: Find bugs in the codebase, file new findings for human triage, and track reported issues in memory to avoid duplicates.

name: Scheduled Architecture Review
summary: On a schedule, review codebase architecture and publish an ADR + task breakdown, tracking decisions in memory.

name: Idea Architecture Analysis
summary: Evaluate a proposed idea against the architecture and emit a scoped implementation plan for downstream delivery.

name: Code Review
summary: Review code for security/correctness/quality, cite file:line fixes, and return an APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES verdict.

name: Release Automation
summary: On merge, bump semver, update changelog, draft release notes, and tag — recording version decisions in memory.

name: On-Demand Security Scan
summary: Scan the codebase for dependency CVEs, secrets, and risky patterns; file severity-ranked findings with fixes, deduped via memory.

name: Sync Documentation
summary: Keep README + changelog in sync with shipped code by analyzing new commits since the last processed point.

name: PR Test + Merge
summary: On dev-clone.pr.created, test the PR in an isolated worktree and enable auto-merge / approve / request-changes per the standards policy.
